Vulnerability: Weak password reuse and exposed login endpoints
Recommended Controls: MFA for admins; rate limiting; CAPTCHA; login monitoring
Encryption at rest; key management; least privilege; backup isolation; anomaly detection

Vulnerability: Compromised developer account or weak change controls
Recommended Controls: Branch protection; peer review; signed commits; MFA; alerting on privileged changes

Vulnerability: Hardcoded secrets in source code or logs
Recommended Controls: Centralized secrets manager; pre-commit scanning; key rotation; least privilege
MFA; role separation; logging; privileged access reviews

Vulnerability: Compromised credentials or insecure integration logic
Recommended Controls: Secret rotation; least privilege; transaction alerting; incident playbook
Backup isolation; recovery testing; restore prioritization; integrity checks
Centralized logging; SIEM; alert thresholds; retention policy

Vulnerability: Weak endpoint protections and phishing exposure
Recommended Controls: EDR; awareness training; MFA; detection rules

Vulnerability: Limited vendor oversight and dependency visibility
Recommended Controls: Vendor risk review; dependency inventory; service monitoring
